display.purpose: Hero headlines and page titles only.

body.purpose: All reading text, labels, and UI copy.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Optional card hover — never at rest.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call to action — turquoise teal pill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: var(--font-body); font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1; padding: 8px 24px; background: var(--color-primary); color: var(--color-bg); border: 1px solid var(--color-primary); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.2, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--color-primary-hover); border-color: var(--color-primary-hover); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--color-focus); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Aurora Badge
components.css: .ds-badge-aurora { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: var(--font-body); font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 3px 10px; background: var(--color-accent); color: var(--color-accent-ink); border: 1px solid var(--color-accent); border-radius: 9999px; }

narrative.northStar: Electric light on an open coast
narrative.overview: Aurora Day is light coastal clarity with botanical warmth. Warm off-whites carry the canvas; turquoise-teal leads; aurora violet punctuates. Precise like Polestar, hospitable like Airbnb, rhythmic like Spotify — but never dark, never SaaS-grey, never sterile.

rules.name: The Aurora on Daylight Rule
rules.body: Violet accents appear on light backgrounds only. Never build a dark sky canvas.

rules.name: The One Punch Rule
rules.body: Aurora violet covers ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Flat Morning Rule
rules.body: Depth through tonal layering, not heavy shadows.

dos: Do keep backgrounds light and warm
Do use turquoise teal for primary actions
Do deploy aurora violet sparingly as the electric accent
donts: Don't use corporate blue-grey SaaS palettes
Don't flood the UI with violet or neon
